case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RODNEY EUGENE GARITA MORALES

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, RODNEY EUGENE GARITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. MATTER CONTINUED TO APRIL 21, 2020 AT 10 A.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODNEY EUGENE GARITA MORALES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
